data.title: Asia Pacific Wire & Cable Posts Higher 2025 Earnings on Modest Revenue Growth
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Asia Pac Wire &Cable ( (APWC) ) just unveiled an update.

Asia Pacific Wire & Cable reported on April 29, 2026 that fourth-quarter 2025 revenue reached $133.8 million, up 4% sequentially but 2% lower year-on-year as fewer public sector orders were completed versus 2024, while quarterly earnings per share climbed to $0.17, a 31% annual increase supported by a one-time $0.7 million investment gain and higher contributions from most regions. For fiscal 2025, revenue rose 4% to $489.7 million and full-year EPS improved 6% to $0.18 despite softer gross margins and higher R&D-driven expenses, signaling modest earnings growth and resilient demand in North Asia and selected public sector markets even as project timing and product mix pressured operating profit and cash flow.

Spark’s Take on APWC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, APWC is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak profitability and negative/volatile free cash flow despite strong recent revenue growth and a moderately levered balance sheet. Technical indicators also point to a soft setup (below key moving averages with negative MACD). Valuation is a modest offset with a mid-range P/E.

To see Spark’s full report on APWC stock, click here.

More about Asia Pac Wire &Cable

Asia Pacific Wire & Cable Corporation Limited is a Taiwan-based manufacturer of wire and cable products serving infrastructure and industrial customers across North Asia, Thailand and other international markets. The company’s performance is closely tied to copper prices, public sector installation projects and regional construction and utilities demand.

Average Trading Volume: 6,584

data.title: Mixed Martial Arts Group Extends TrainAlta to UFC GYM Australia in First Global Rollout
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Mixed Martial Arts Group ( (MMA) ).

On April 29, 2026, Mixed Martial Arts Group Limited announced that its TrainAlta training program had gone live in five UFC GYM locations in Australia, marking the platform’s first international rollout beyond North America. TrainAlta is now operating at UFC GYM sites in Sydney CBD, Macarthur Square, Wetherill Park, Woolooware and Bankstown, extending its structured, coach-led martial arts curriculum into a market with a strong combat sports culture.

The move builds on TrainAlta’s deployment across UFC GYM North America since 2023 and is positioned as a key milestone in scaling MMA.INC’s programming layer across a global gym network. By adding more standardized, repeatable training activity into its ecosystem, MMA.INC aims to deepen member engagement, enhance data visibility on user behavior and reinforce long-term monetization opportunities linked to participation, retention, loyalty and rewards, complementing accelerating usage metrics such as 216,000 training check-ins recorded in Q1 2026.

More about Mixed Martial Arts Group

Mixed Martial Arts Group Limited, which trades as MMA.INC on the NYSE American, operates a technology-driven ecosystem serving the global combat sports and martial arts industry. Through assets including TrainAlta, BJJLink, Hype and MixedMartialArts.com, it connects more than 5 million social followers, 530,000 user profiles and 75,000+ active students across 18,000 published gyms in 22 countries.

Average Trading Volume: 484,881

data.title: Itaú Unibanco Shareholders Approve Merger of Banco Itaucard and Bylaw Changes
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Itau Unibanco ( (ITUB) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 28, 2026, Itaú Unibanco Holding S.A. held an extraordinary general stockholders’ meeting online with a quorum representing 92.28% of its common shares, alongside management, supervisory council members and the external auditor. Shareholders approved summarized minutes, the omission of signatures in published minutes and the waiver of reading documents that had already been disclosed.

The meeting ratified the engagement of PricewaterhouseCoopers to appraise Banco Itaucard S.A., valuing its equity at R$51,856,273.27 as of December 31, 2025, and approved the merger of Itaucard into Itaú Unibanco without a capital increase or new share issuance. Upon completion and subject to prior Central Bank of Brazil approval, Itaucard will be dissolved and all its assets, rights and obligations will be universally assumed by Itaú Unibanco, which will handle book-keeping and registrations.

Shareholders also approved amendments to the bylaws to record the updated composition of subscribed and paid-in capital following prior share cancellations and capital increases within authorized limits. The bylaw changes further expanded the permissible size of the Board of Officers to between five and 60 members, and the bylaws were consolidated, with effectiveness contingent on Central Bank ratification, signaling continued consolidation and governance adjustments within the group.

The most recent analyst rating on (ITUB) stock is a Buy with a $9.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Itau Unibanco stock, see the ITUB Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ITUB Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ITUB is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by solid financial performance (growth and ROE) but held back by leverage and cash-flow volatility. Technicals are supportive with a strong uptrend, though momentum looks somewhat stretched. Valuation is favorable given the moderate P/E and high dividend yield, and the latest earnings call reinforced constructive fundamentals with cautious but reasonable 2026 guidance.

To see Spark’s full report on ITUB stock, click here.

More about Itau Unibanco

Itaú Unibanco Holding S.A. is Brazil’s largest private-sector financial institution, operating as a universal bank with activities spanning retail, wholesale and investment banking, credit cards, and other financial services. The group focuses on the Brazilian and broader Latin American markets and is regulated by the Central Bank of Brazil, with its shares registered in the United States via SEC filings.

An announcement from Canadian National Railway ( (TSE:CNR) ) is now available.

On April 29, 2026, CN announced it had filed a new shelf prospectus with Canadian regulators and a corresponding registration statement with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. The filings allow the railway to issue debt securities in both Canadian and U.S. markets over the next 37 months, replacing a prior shelf set to expire on May 3, 2026.

CN said it plans to use any net proceeds for general corporate purposes, including potential debt redemption and refinancing, share repurchases, acquisitions and other business opportunities. The move enhances CN’s financial flexibility and access to capital markets, positioning the company to manage its balance sheet and pursue strategic investments as funding needs arise.

It is tempered by higher leverage and soft recent free-cash-flow growth, a valuation that is not cheap at ~20x earnings, and a cautious earnings outlook tied to flat volumes, tariff/trade uncertainty, and a planned near-term increase in leverage.

To see Spark’s full report on CNR stock, click here.

More about Canadian National Railway

Canadian National Railway Company (CN) is a leading North American freight railroad that transports over 300 million tons of natural resources, manufactured products and finished goods annually. Operating a nearly 20,000‑mile rail network, it links Canada’s East and West coasts with the U.S. Midwest and Gulf Coast, supporting cross‑border trade and community prosperity since 1919.

data.title: Merlin Announces $80 Million Private Equity Investment Agreement
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Merlin ( (MRLN) ) just unveiled an update.

On April 29, 2026, Merlin, Inc. announced it had entered into a private investment in public equity agreement with an existing institutional shareholder to raise $80 million through the sale of 8 million common shares at $10 each and warrants for 4 million additional shares. The transaction, structured as a private placement exempt from U.S. securities registration requirements, is expected to close around May 1, 2026 and will trigger anti-dilution adjustments to the company’s existing convertible preferred stock and certain warrants.

The financing will lift Merlin’s total cash resources to about $183 million and is intended to accelerate revenue generation and long-term value creation, including advancing its core autonomous flight platform, funding regulatory approvals and scaling program capacity. The updated registration rights arrangements commit Merlin to register the resale of the new shares and warrant shares, bolstering liquidity for investors, while the investment deepens the relationship with a long-term shareholder and reinforces Merlin’s balance sheet as it pursues 2026–2027 program milestones and its commercial launch timeline.

The most recent analyst rating on (MRLN) stock is a Buy with a $25.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Merlin stock, see the MRLN Stock Forecast page.

More about Merlin

Merlin, Inc. is a U.S.-based aerospace technology company specializing in cost-effective, takeoff-to-touchdown autonomous flight systems for both legacy and next-generation aircraft. Its aircraft-agnostic, AI-powered software serves military and civil programs, supporting a growing range of missions and platforms and backed by more than $100 million in awarded military contracts.

The company focuses on assured, autonomous flight technology that addresses national security challenges while enabling commercial applications. Its systems have been validated through hundreds of autonomous flights at test facilities worldwide, positioning Merlin as a leading player in defense-related autonomy and emerging commercial autonomous aviation markets.

data.title: Galapagos Shareholders Approve Name Change to Lakefront Biotherapeutics and Broad Governance Overhaul
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Galapagos ( (GLPG) ) has provided an announcement.

On 28 April 2026, Galapagos NV held its Annual and Extraordinary Shareholders’ Meetings, where investors approved the 2025 annual and remuneration reports, discharged directors and the auditor from liability, and confirmed a broad refresh of the board with the appointment of CEO Henry Gosebruch as executive director and several new independent and non-executive directors. Shareholders also reappointed the statutory auditor and mandated it to provide assurance on the company’s CSRD sustainability reporting, underlining an increased focus on governance and non-financial disclosure.

At the Extraordinary Meeting the company’s owners backed a name change to “Lakefront Biotherapeutics,” effective 8 May 2026, authorized the board to repurchase shares, and renewed authorized capital by up to 20% of existing share capital, giving management more financial and strategic flexibility. The governance overhaul and new capital tools are intended to support Galapagos’ ongoing transformation and next growth phase, with incoming chair Gino Santini expected to play a key role in executing the strategy and balancing patient impact with sustainable shareholder returns.

The most recent analyst rating on (GLPG) stock is a Hold with a $28.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Galapagos stock, see the GLPG Stock Forecast page.

To see Spark’s full report on GLPG stock, click here.

Leveraging a modality-agnostic asset selection strategy and strong deal-making capabilities, it prioritizes oncology and immunology & inflammation programs with clear clinical proof-of-concept to create value for patients and shareholders.

GCL Global Holdings ( (GCL) ) has issued an update.

In April 2026, GCL Global Holdings Ltd. partially redeemed approximately $3.18 million of its outstanding senior convertible notes originally issued under a May 21, 2025 Securities Purchase Agreement, and exchanged the remaining balance for a warrant to purchase 1,125,000 ordinary shares at an initial exercise price of $8.00 per share. The amendment and exchange eliminated the prospect of additional note issuances under the prior financing, simplifying GCL’s capital structure and shifting the investor’s remaining exposure from debt to equity-linked securities.

On April 29, 2026, GCL announced that its publishing subsidiary 4Divinity entered into a Memorandum of Understanding with Chengdu Cangmo for proposed worldwide publishing rights to the Ming Dynasty–set action-stealth RPG “A Whisper of Fall: Jinyiwei.” The prospective deal, which would cover PC, console and mobile platforms and target a 2027 launch on PlayStation 5 and PC, underscores GCL’s push to elevate Chinese-developed AA titles globally and deepen its pipeline of culturally distinctive Asian gaming IP, potentially strengthening its competitive position in international publishing.

Spark’s Take on GCL Stock

data.title: Braskem Calls Fully Digital Shareholder Meeting to Overhaul Bylaws and Governance
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Braskem SA ( (BAK) ) has provided an announcement.

Braskem S.A. has called an extraordinary general meeting to be held digitally on May 28, 2026, as it advances a shareholding transaction disclosed in material facts dated April 20 and 23. The company plans broad amendments to its bylaws to align with a new shareholders’ agreement, refine corporate governance rules for the general meeting, Board of Directors and Executive Board, and formally embed several key board committees, including finance, strategy, people and safety, into its statutes.

Shareholders will also vote on consolidating the restated bylaws, authorizing an early end to the current Executive Board term so its new two-year mandate coincides with the Board elected at the April 29, 2026 AGM, electing a new Board of Directors, and replacing members of the Fiscal Council. The meeting will be held exclusively via Webex, with participation allowed either through remote voting ballots or direct access to the digital platform, and shareholders must submit ownership and identification documents in advance under Brazil’s CVM Resolution 81, underscoring the company’s shift toward fully digital, procedure-heavy governance.

The most recent analyst rating on (BAK) stock is a Sell with a $1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Braskem SA stock, see the BAK Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BAK is a Neutral.

BAK scores low primarily due to very weak financial performance—losses, negative/volatile cash generation, and a highly stressed balance sheet with negative equity and heavy leverage. Technical indicators also point to soft near-term momentum. The earnings call provides some mitigation via liquidity and executed cost actions, but restructuring/regulatory uncertainty and a difficult industry backdrop keep the overall risk profile elevated, while valuation is hard to justify given negative earnings and no dividend data.

Braskem S.A. is a publicly held Brazilian petrochemical producer based in the Camaçari complex in Bahia. The company operates in the chemical and plastics industry, focusing on large-scale production of resins and petrochemical inputs for industrial and consumer markets in Brazil and abroad.

data.description:

An announcement from Braskem SA ( (BAK) ) is now available.

Braskem’s management has called an extraordinary general meeting for May 28, 2026, to be held exclusively in digital format via Webex, with voting rights extended to both class A and B preferred shares alongside common shares. The meeting is convened in the context of a shareholding transaction announced on April 20 and 23, 2026, involving the judicial sale of a large Braskem stake from Novonor-related entities to an investment fund (FIP) and the signing of a new shareholders’ agreement between Petrobras and the FIP to establish balanced governance.

Subject to judicial and other conditions precedent, the transaction is expected to reshape Braskem’s control structure and governance, prompting a broad reform of the company’s bylaws to align with the new shareholders’ agreement and embed several board committees as statutory bodies. Shareholders will vote on bylaw changes, consolidation and renumbering of provisions, authorization to shorten the current executive board term to match the board of directors’ mandate, election of a new board of directors through 2028, and replacement of fiscal council members, signaling a forthcoming governance overhaul if the deal is consummated.

The most recent analyst rating on (BAK) stock is a Sell with a $1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Braskem SA stock, see the BAK Stock Forecast page.

BAK scores low primarily due to very weak financial performance—losses, negative/volatile cash generation, and a highly stressed balance sheet with negative equity and heavy leverage. Technical indicators also point to soft near-term momentum. The earnings call provides some mitigation via liquidity and executed cost actions, but restructuring/regulatory uncertainty and a difficult industry backdrop keep the overall risk profile elevated, while valuation is hard to justify given negative earnings and no dividend data.

Braskem S.A. is a Brazilian petrochemical company based in Camaçari, Bahia, operating in the chemicals and plastics sector. The company produces a wide range of petrochemical products and resins and has a significant role in Latin America’s industrial supply chains, with corporate governance shaped by major shareholders including Petrobras and investment funds.

On April 29, 2026, iPower Inc. announced that as of April 28, 2026, cash and marketable digital assets in its collateral account had an aggregate reference market value of about $4.05 million, exceeding the roughly $3.69 million remaining note balance owed to its institutional investor. iPower said this improved collateral coverage enhances its financial flexibility and provides additional strategic optionality as it works to improve efficiency and execute its operating strategy. data.title: Laser Photonics Raises Capital Through Warrant Inducement Financing
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

An update from Laser Photonics Corp. ( (LASE) ) is now available.

On April 26, 2026, Laser Photonics Corp. entered into a warrant inducement agreement with holders of its Series A-1 and A-2 warrants, leading to the cash exercise of warrants to purchase up to 5,715,085 shares at $0.70 per share and generating gross proceeds of about $4 million. In connection with this financing, which closed and was announced on April 29, 2026, the company issued new unregistered Series A-5 and A-6 warrants with higher exercise prices, while accepting issuance restrictions and registration deadlines that introduce both future dilution potential and compliance obligations for existing shareholders.

The transaction included the grant of placement agent warrants and fees to H.C. Wainwright & Co., and commits Laser Photonics to file an S-1 to register resale of shares underlying the new warrants within specified timeframes, with cash penalties if it fails to meet these milestones. The deal bolsters near-term liquidity for working capital and general corporate purposes but also adds warrant overhang and limits the company’s ability to undertake additional equity issuance or variable-rate financings for defined periods, shaping its capital-raising flexibility in the coming year.

Spark’s Take on LASE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, LASE is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by weak financial quality—significant losses, persistent cash burn, and a weakened balance sheet with negative equity. Technicals are only neutral and still reflect a longer-term downtrend, while valuation is constrained by ongoing losses and no dividend support. data.title: Foresight’s Eye-Net Signs LOI for Large-Scale V2X Smart-City Pilot in Manila Metro
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Foresight Autonomous Holdings ( (FRSX) ) is now available.

On April 29, 2026, Foresight Autonomous Holdings announced that its majority-owned subsidiary Eye-Net Mobile signed a non-binding letter of intent with the City of Muntinlupa in the Manila metropolitan area of the Philippines. The agreement positions the city of roughly 600,000 residents as a testbed for Eye-Net’s cellular-based V2X technology focused on smart urban mobility, collision prediction and prevention, and road-user protection.

Following the LOI, the parties plan to negotiate a commercial cooperation deal that would include live demonstrations and, if successful, a six-month pilot involving at least 8,000 road users across Muntinlupa. Subject to meeting predefined KPIs, the collaboration could progress to integrating Eye-Net’s SDK into one of the city’s mobile applications, extending beyond collision-avoidance alerts to support critical emergency services, potentially strengthening Foresight’s smart-city footprint in Southeast Asia and enhancing urban resilience in scenarios such as natural disasters and other crises.

Spark’s Take on FRSX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, FRSX is a Neutral.

The score is primarily driven by very weak financial performance (declining revenue, large ongoing losses, and sustained negative free cash flow). Technicals add pressure as the stock trades below key moving averages with negative MACD, while valuation provides limited support due to negative earnings and no dividend data.

To see Spark’s full report on FRSX stock, click here.

More about Foresight Autonomous Holdings

Foresight Autonomous Holdings Ltd., listed on Nasdaq and TASE under ticker FRSX, is an Israeli technology company developing advanced three-dimensional perception and cellular-based safety applications for automotive and mobility markets. Through subsidiaries Foresight Automotive, Foresight Changzhou Automotive and majority-owned Eye-Net Mobile, it offers in-line-of-sight vision systems and beyond-line-of-sight accident-prevention solutions for sectors including automotive, defense, autonomous driving, agriculture, heavy industrial equipment and UAVs.

Eye-Net Mobile develops next-generation vehicle-to-everything collision prevention solutions and smart automotive systems that leverage artificial intelligence, advanced analytics and existing cellular networks. Its technology delivers real-time pre-collision alerts to all road users via smartphones and other smart devices, aiming to enhance road safety and situational awareness in dense urban mobility environments.

data.title: TIAN RUIXIANG Unwinds Ren Talents Share Exchange, Cancels 3.2 Million Escrowed Shares
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

TIAN RUIXIANG Holdings ( (TIRXF) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On April 21, 2026, TIAN RUIXIANG Holdings Ltd. and its wholly owned subsidiary VitaCare Limited entered into a Termination and Rescission Agreement with Ren Talents Inc., unwinding a November 4, 2025 share exchange that had been closed but remained executory because contingent consideration had not been finalized and the 3,211,010 TRX Class A shares stayed in escrow. The parties agreed to reverse the transaction ab initio by returning 100% of Ren Talents Inc.’s equity to the original sellers, cancelling all escrowed TRX shares back to authorized but unissued status, and mutually ring-fencing liabilities and delisting or compliance risks, a move that restores pre-deal balance sheets and clarifies that no further performance, earn-out or audit obligations will arise from the abandoned acquisition.

The agreement, which became effective upon execution and was disclosed in a Form 6-K filed on April 28, 2026, also provides for mutual releases of claims related to the original deal and sets out coordinated regulatory reporting in the U.S. and China. For investors, the rescission means TRX steps back from integrating Ren Talents Inc., avoids assuming its debts or litigation exposure, and preserves capital structure flexibility by eliminating the contingent share issuance, while the sellers are shielded from TRX’s own compliance and potential Nasdaq delisting risks.

Spark’s Take on TIRXF Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TIRXF is a Neutral.

Tian Ruixiang Holdings’ overall stock score is primarily impacted by its financial performance and technical analysis. The company faces significant profitability challenges, and technical indicators suggest bearish momentum. Valuation metrics are poor, with a negative P/E ratio and no dividend yield, further weighing down the score.

More about TIAN RUIXIANG Holdings

TIAN RUIXIANG Holdings Ltd. is a Cayman Islands–incorporated company listed on Nasdaq, operating through subsidiaries including British Virgin Islands–based VitaCare Limited. The group is headquartered in Beijing, China, and is positioned as a foreign private issuer under U.S. securities regulations, filing periodic reports with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission.

data.title: Luda Technology Group Delays Annual SEC Filing
data.description:
Luda Technology Group Limited ( (LUD) ) has released a notification of late filing.

Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Luda Technology Group Limited has filed a Form 12b-25 to notify investors that it will delay its Form 20-F (Yearly Report) for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025. The company is listed under SEC file number 001-42289 and is required to submit an annual Form 20-F (Yearly Report) as a foreign private issuer.

The company cites the need for additional time to review its financial statements as the sole reason for the delay. It does not mention auditor changes, internal control failures, regulatory investigations or any external disruptions, suggesting the issue is primarily timing and internal review workload.

Under the relief provisions of Rule 12b-25, Luda Technology Group Limited expects to file its Form 20-F (Yearly Report) within the standard fifteen-calendar-day extension window. With the original deadline of April 30, 2026, this implies an expected filing on or before mid-May 2026, barring unforeseen complications.

The company states that it does not anticipate any significant change in its results of operations compared with the prior fiscal year. That means investors should not, based on this notice alone, expect major surprises in earnings, though actual results will only be confirmed when the Form 20-F (Yearly Report) is filed and all standard forward-looking uncertainties still apply.

Luda Technology Group Limited confirms that all other required periodic reports over the past 12 months have been filed, signaling ongoing baseline compliance with SEC reporting rules. The notification is signed on behalf of the company by Chief Executive Officer Ma Biu on April 29, 2026, underscoring management’s formal commitment to complete the filing within the allowed extension.

More about Luda Technology Group Limited

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell
